name: po_compliance_audit
description: Audit purchase orders for compliance: filter by finished status and amount threshold, then require both vendor service-scope coverage and a valid VP approval (sender email maps to a VP whose role is valid on the approval date, not later than po_date, and the email body must approve all service_items of this exact PO). Reads approval attachment bodies. Returns non-compliant po_ids ascending, comma-separated. Use for PO compliance audit tasks.
